creator: rhurlin@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to m.ne from comment #16)

Hmm, if this is true, how do you interpret the code snippets from comment #12 and comment #13, were '-I /usr/local/share/PyQtsip/3.6/sip' is included, which does not exist. If I change this one to '-I /usr/local/share/PyQt5/3.6/sip', sip found QtXml etc. again.


>building 'popplerqt5' extension
>/usr/local/bin/sip-3.6 -I /usr/local/share/PyQtsip/3.6/sip ...
                                            ^^^^^^^
